summary: A CBS Morning News broadcast segment showing footage (credited to the Dept. of Homeland Security) of officers arresting a man outside a Texas ICE facility after an alleged bomb threat. It carries the CBS Morning News logo and a news chyron. There is no added music or styling.
notable_text: CBS MORNING NEWS / MAN ARRESTED FOR ALLEGEDLY MAKING BOMB THREATS OUTSIDE TEXAS ICE FACILITY / DEPT. OF HOMELAND SECURITY
